name: Drift Baseline And Monitoring Handoff
phase: Phase E - Release Closeout, Evidence Ledger, And Growth Handoff
decision: E-4 can close as a monitoring and drift-baseline handoff. Mitra cannot be release-ready or growth-ready until the live blockers recorded in E-3 and carried into this baseline are fixed and revalidated.
releaseBlockersCarriedForward: sitemap-products.xml and merchant-products.xml return HTML instead of XML.
Legacy redirect rules are not active on the www host.
Opaque product UUID route does not permanently redirect to the slug URL.
Invalid and accidental route variants return HTTP 200 soft-404s.
Checkout can render on a product URL after cart action.

owners.verification: Unauthenticated /cms and private/admin/account routes return 401, 403, or safe 404 and no private content is rendered.
robots, sitemap, product sitemap, merchant feed, legacy redirects, and product ID redirects pass public HTTP checks.

owners.area: Search Console, analytics, Merchant Center, GBP
owners.verification: Authenticated readback confirms ownership, submitted assets, diagnostics, events, and conversion/outcome data.

owners.area: Content, local facts, products, and offers
owners.verification: Visible content, schema, feed, GBP/citations, price, availability, and checkout facts match source of truth.

noGuarantee: This monitoring system improves implementation quality and regression detection. It does not guarantee crawling, indexing, rankings, rich results, traffic, revenue, conversions, or AI inclusion.
